title: Claim ADR-173 GitHub raw import correction
body: Fragrant Regrowing Root opened claim 947deb2d-801b-42db-bd9c-b2e3f42c0838 to correct ADR-173: ontology raw import should pull full straight-copy Turtle/SHACL files from oaknational/oak-curriculum-ontology GitHub raw URLs, then ingest/enhance internally.
